---
title: "Session 15: Final Presentations & Wrap-up"
subtitle: "Day 5 · Project Finalization & Presentations (5-3)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 15: Final Presentations & Wrap-up

## 📋 Agenda

- Group presentations with instructor Q&A
- Course wrap-up discussion

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# Group presentations & Q&A

## Group presentations & Q&A

<!-- to be added -->

# Course wrap-up

## Course wrap-up

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
